reasoning: Creating two new AI providers (z.AI and OpenRouter) following well-established patterns from existing OpenAIProvider and AnthropicProvider implementations. Both likely use OpenAI-compatible API formats, minimizing complexity. Research needed primarily for z.AI API specifics and token handling.

scope.notes: Two new provider packages (~4 files each: source, index, tests, config). Changes contained to AI provider ecosystem following monorepo pattern.

integrations.notes: Both services likely use OpenAI-compatible API format. z.AI is xAI's Grok API. OpenRouter is a well-documented API aggregator. Can likely reuse OpenAI SDK or minimal HTTP client.

infrastructure.notes: New packages need workspace config in package.json. New environment variables for API tokens (Z_AI_API_KEY, OPENROUTER_API_KEY). No Docker or database changes required.

knowledge.notes: OpenAIProvider (472 lines) and AnthropicProvider (336 lines) provide clear implementation templates. OpenRouter follows OpenAI format. z.AI API specifics need verification.

concerns: API key management for two new providers
Ensuring streaming works correctly with both services
risk.notes: Low risk due to well-established patterns. Main concerns are API compatibility verification and proper error handling.

validation_recommendations.reasoning: New API provider integrations require unit tests for message conversion and streaming logic, plus integration tests for API communication. Security scan needed for API key handling patterns. No staging deployment needed as changes are contained to provider packages.

existing_patterns.provider_interface: packages/ai/src/providers/AIProvider.ts - Abstract base class with initialize(), chat(), supportsTools(), supportsVision(), destroy()
existing_patterns.openai_provider: packages/ai-openai/src/OpenAIProvider.ts - 472 lines, supports proxy mode, streaming, tools, vision

implementation_notes.suggested_approach: Clone ai-openai package structure for both providers. z.AI and OpenRouter both use OpenAI-compatible APIs, so OpenAIProvider can serve as direct template with baseURL modifications.

key_differences.z_ai: Different base URL (api.x.ai), 'coding plan' token type implies specific API tier/scope
key_differences.openrouter: Requires model routing (model IDs like 'openrouter/auto' or 'anthropic/claude-3'), may need additional headers (HTTP-Referer, X-Title)
